reviews.comment:
Excelente atención y ubicación
Ser socio del ACA tiene sus privilegios!!
Recomiendo pasar temprano por  la cafetería y tomar un rico café con medialunas mientras te lavan el auto con turno coordinado

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and location! Being an ACA member has its perks!
I recommend stopping by the café early and enjoying a delicious coffee and croissants while you have your car washed (by appointment).
